artPrompt: A mid-stride creature is frozen rigid in cold cyan light, caught crossing a beige City Hall threshold, its motion arrested as a glowing blank rubber stamp hovers above its head mid-descent. Towering shelves of untouched forms recede into humming fluorescent haze behind it. Tense low film-still angle conveying suspended motion and deep perspective, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Permit Pending Review
text: Tap target creature. Its application to do whatever it was about to do is now under review.
flavorText: "We'll get back to you." They will not get back to you.
